title: TSD Daily — Sunday, June 7, 2026
summary: Microsoft ships seven in-house models and a Copilot coder, DeepSeek's first raise, a Next.js patch that becomes a recurring Site Care offer, an ISS shelter scare, and two championship series swinging.

title: TSD Daily — June 5, 2026
summary: Anthropic nears a trillion and Opus 4.8 ships, a Next.js security patch you need, a steady US jobs report against four-year-high gas, and a quiet week for Claude Code.
